# POS Internal UI Shell Brainstorm

---
type: brainstorm
date: 2026-05-20
topic: pos-internal-ui-shell
status: agreed
---

## Summary

Build internal POS dashboard UI from provided screenshots. Chosen approach: shell plus route placeholders, responsive layout across desktop, tablet, and mobile. Must follow `docs/design-guidelines.md`.

## Canonical Desktop Reference

The supplied full-screen SVG at `1440x1024` is the primary desktop UI target for implementation. Use the smaller SVGs below as asset/icon references only. Before implementation, save or link the full canonical SVG source in the plan/report assets so visual QA is not dependent on chat history.

Key desktop measurements from the reference:

| Element | Target |
|---|---|
| Canvas | `1440x1024`, background `#F2F3ED` |
| Sidebar | `225px` wide, full height, bg `#143D00` |
| Topbar | `60px` high, white, subtle drop shadow |
| Sidebar active item | `x=10`, `w=205`, `h=40`, `rx=5`, dark bg, white icon/text; use `#256E05` for active text surfaces and reserve `#3CB018` for accent/hover/UI-only states |
| Bottom settings bar | `52px` high, bg `#256E05`, pinned at bottom |
| Search | Topbar pill, `262x38`, `rx=19`, border `#D3D3D3` |
| Main content | Starts right of sidebar and below topbar, bg `#F2F3ED` |

Desktop acceptance viewport: `1440x1024`. The shell should visually match the supplied full-screen SVG structure, with the active navigation contrast adjustment above. Responsive behavior is required across wide desktop, standard desktop, tablet, and mobile.

## Codebase Findings

| Area | Finding |
|---|---|
| Stack | Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, CSS, `lucide-react` |
| Current shell | `components/layout/dashboard-shell.tsx` and `app/dashboard.css` are simple card dashboard |
| Current routes | `/dashboard`, `/dashboard/sales`, `/dashboard/orders`, `/dashboard/menu`, `/dashboard/staff`, `/dashboard/staff/approvals`, `/dashboard/staff/roles`, `/dashboard/settings` |
| Auth/RBAC | Server-enforced module visibility in `lib/auth/permissions.ts` |
| Design source | `docs/design-guidelines.md`: Inter, brand greens, off-white bg, small radius, lucide icons |

## Requirements

| Requirement | Decision |
|---|---|
| Expected output | Internal dashboard shell matching canonical `1440x1024` desktop SVG: topbar, sidebar, expandable groups, user area, module placeholders |
| Acceptance | Desktop `1440x1024` screenshot matches canonical SVG structure; wide desktop/tablet/mobile responsive screenshots are usable; colors/typography follow design guidelines and WCAG contrast |
| Scope | UI shell and placeholder screens only |
| Out of scope | Real POS cart, payment, inventory data, tables workflow, realtime, receipt printing |
| Touchpoints | `components/layout/dashboard-shell.tsx`, `app/dashboard.css`, dashboard route pages; touch `lib/auth/permissions.ts` only if access rules change, not for label/copy changes |

### RBAC Navigation Coverage

Preserve all server-visible modules. Do not drop links while redesigning the sidebar.

| Module | Route | Typical roles |
|---|---|---|
| Overview | `/dashboard` | All active roles |
| Sales | `/dashboard/sales` | ROOT_ADMIN, ADMIN, STAFF |
| Orders | `/dashboard/orders` | ROOT_ADMIN, ADMIN, STAFF |
| Menu | `/dashboard/menu` | ROOT_ADMIN, ADMIN |
| Staff | `/dashboard/staff` | ROOT_ADMIN, ADMIN |
| Staff approvals | `/dashboard/staff/approvals` | ROOT_ADMIN, ADMIN |
| Staff roles | `/dashboard/staff/roles` | ROOT_ADMIN |
| Settings | `/dashboard/settings` | ROOT_ADMIN, ADMIN |

### Asset And Icon Policy

- Use existing ViePOS logo assets from `public/images/` when available.
- Use `lucide-react` for standard UI icons, matching current code and design guidelines.
- Use custom SVG only for ViePOS logo/logomark or unique reference artwork that lucide cannot represent.
- Do not paste large raw SVG paths into React components unless they are committed as explicit assets.

## Evaluated Approaches

| Approach | Pros | Cons | Decision |
|---|---|---|---|
| A. Shell only | Fastest, low risk | Pages can still feel empty | Rejected |
| B. Shell plus placeholders | Good demo, clear navigation, avoids fake business logic | More UI work | Accepted |
| C. Full POS workflow | Looks complete | Too many guessed rules from screenshots | Rejected |

## Final Design

### Desktop

- Topbar fixed height `60px`, white bg, subtle shadow.
- Left: ViePOS logo, sidebar collapse button, search input.
- Right: help, favorite, notification icons, divider, user avatar, name, role, dropdown chevron.
- Sidebar `225px`, dark green `#143D00`, left aligned, full height. This canonical mockup width overrides the older `280px` sidebar note in `docs/design-guidelines.md` for this shell.
- Active group uses dark green background with white icon/text. Do not use white normal text on `#3CB018`; contrast is below WCAG AA for normal text.
- Use `#3CB018` for accent strips, hover backgrounds without normal text, or UI-only marks where contrast passes.
- Expanded groups render child links indented.
- Settings pinned bottom.
- Main content uses off-white `#F2F3ED`.

### Responsive

- Desktop `1440x1024` is the primary visual target.
- Wide desktop is required: verify at `1920x1080` and `2560x1440`; shell expands full width while sidebar/topbar dimensions stay stable.
- On wide screens, main content should use responsive grids and readable max widths so cards/forms do not stretch into long unreadable lines.
- Tablet and mobile are required responsive layouts.
- Topbar remains compact.
- Sidebar becomes drawer overlay.
- Menu button opens/closes drawer.
- Search can collapse to icon-first compact input.
- Main content full width.
- Touch targets at least 44px high.
- Verify at `2560x1440`, `1920x1080`, `1440x1024`, `1024x768`, and `390x844`.

### Placeholder Screens

Placeholder means visible temporary UI for routes without real business logic. It may include title, short module description, empty state, and basic metric blocks. It must not fake API integration or business state.

## Risks

| Risk | Mitigation |
|---|---|
| Canonical SVG shows navigation shell, not real module body | Keep body placeholders minimal; do not invent POS workflow |
| Full canonical SVG source can be lost if it stays only in chat | Save or link source SVG as a plan/report asset before implementation |
| Current dashboard shell differs strongly | Replace shell carefully; preserve server RBAC |
| Responsive layouts are inferred beyond the desktop SVG | Verify wide desktop, desktop, tablet, and mobile screenshots explicitly |
| One-note green UI | Use off-white, white, gray neutrals from design guidelines |
| Active state contrast can fail if using white normal text on `#3CB018` | Use dark active background with white text; reserve `#3CB018` for accent/hover/UI-only states |
| Sidebar redesign can accidentally hide admin-only modules | Verify visible modules for STAFF, ADMIN, ROOT_ADMIN roles |
| UI copy changes accidentally modify RBAC code | Keep labels/copy in shell navigation config; touch permissions only for access-rule changes |

## Success Metrics

- Desktop screenshot at `1440x1024` matches canonical SVG layout: `225px` sidebar, `60px` topbar, search pill, right user/action area, bottom settings bar.
- Wide desktop screenshots at `1920x1080` and `2560x1440` show full-width shell, stable sidebar/topbar, and content that does not over-stretch.
- Tablet screenshot at `1024x768` and mobile screenshot at `390x844` show usable responsive layouts without clipped text or hidden primary navigation.
- Active/sidebar text meets WCAG AA contrast for normal text.
- Sidebar expanded/collapsed states work.
- Mobile drawer usable on small viewport.
- Existing RBAC module filtering still enforced server-side.
- STAFF sees Sales/Orders only; ADMIN sees Sales/Orders/Menu/Staff/Approvals/Settings; ROOT_ADMIN also sees Staff roles.
- `pnpm lint`, `pnpm type-check`, and relevant tests pass after implementation.

## Next Steps

1. Create implementation plan.
2. Implement shell and placeholders.
3. Verify wide desktop, desktop, tablet, and mobile visually.
4. Run compile/lint/test checks.

## Unresolved Questions

None.
